raw_answer_text: \(\left[\begin{array}{l}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \dot{x}_3 \\ \dot{x}_4\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{cccc}-a & 0 & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & -b & 0 & 0 \\ 1 & 1 & -c & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1 & -d\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{l}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ x_3 \\ x_4\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{l}1 \\ 0 \\ 0 \\ 0\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}0 & 0 & 1 & 0\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{l}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ x_3 \\ x_4\end{array}\right]\)

choice_map.A: \(\left[\begin{array}{l}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \dot{x}_3 \\ \dot{x}_4\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{cccc}-a & 0 & 0 & 1 \\ 0 & -b & 1 & 0 \\ 0 & 1 & -c & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1 & -d\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{l}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ x_3 \\ x_4\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{l}0 \\ 0 \\ 1 \\ 0\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}0 & 1 & 0 & 1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{l}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ x_3 \\ x_4\end{array}\right]\)
choice_map.B: \(\left[\begin{array}{l}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \dot{x}_3 \\ \dot{x}_4\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{cccc}-a & 0 & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & -b & 0 & 0 \\ 1 & 1 & -c & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1 & -d\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{l}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ x_3 \\ x_4\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{l}1 \\ 0 \\ 0 \\ 0\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}0 & 0 & 1 & 0\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{l}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ x_3 \\ x_4\end{array}\right]\)
choice_map.C: \(\left[\begin{array}{l}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \dot{x}_3 \\ \dot{x}_4\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{cccc}-a & 0 & 0 & 0 \\ 1 & -b & 1 & 0 \\ 1 & 0 & -c & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1 & -d\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{l}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ x_3 \\ x_4\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{l}0 \\ 0 \\ 0 \\ 1\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}1 & 0 & 1 & 0\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{l}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ x_3 \\ x_4\end{array}\right]\)
choice_map.D: \(\left[\begin{array}{l}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \dot{x}_3 \\ \dot{x}_4\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{cccc}-a & 0 & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & -b & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & -c & 1 \\ 0 & 1 & 0 & -d\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{l}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ x_3 \\ x_4\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{l}0 \\ 1 \\ 0 \\ 0\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}1 & 0 & 0 & 1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{l}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ x_3 \\ x_4\end{array}\right]\)
